subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and firmly rooted! The cloud of mercy hath cast its shadow overhead, and the rays of the Most Great Bounty have shone forth upon both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت سحاب رحمت سایه بر سر افکنده و انوار فیض اعظم بر شرق و غرب تابیده
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
